name: test-declaration-only
activation_state_notes: Synthetic test fixture. Exercises the renderer's activation_state refusal gate (per wake-provider/SKILL.md §3.10). Preconditions intentionally listed (cnos#454 / cnos#467 / preconditions) so the AC5 stderr-content check matches.
description: Synthetic declaration-only fixture used by install-wake-golden CI to verify `cn install-wake` exit-3 refusal semantics post cnos#487 (which flipped the production cds-dispatch manifest to `live`). This fixture is intentionally minimal and NEVER rendered to a substrate workflow — it exists solely to keep the AC5 negative-case smoke alive.
responsibilities: exercise the renderer's activation_state refusal gate at exit code 3

defer_path.all: n/a (declaration-only fixture; defer to operator for everything)
